61970-600-2_Equipment-AP-Con-Simple-SHACL

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueTypeNodeShape​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueType​

Path: cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.CsConverter, cim.VsConverter]

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-cardinality​

Path: cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment
This constraint validates the cardinality of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "Missing required association."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinCountConstraintComponentMinCount: 1
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.polarity-datatype​

Path: cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.polarity
This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier) or it is enumerated value not part of the profile."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.DCPolarityKind.middle, cim.DCPolarityKind.positive, cim.DCPolarityKind.negative]

coreeqc.ACDCConverterDCTerminal.polarity-cardinality​

This constraint validates the cardinality of the property (attribute).

ComponentDetails

This constraint validates the cardinality of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "Cardinality violation. Upper bound shall be 1"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

coreeqc.ACDCTerminal.BusNameMarker-valueType​

Path: cim.ACDCTerminal.BusNameMarker / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: cim:BusNameMarker"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.BusNameMarker]

ComponentDetails

coreeqc.ControlArea.EnergyArea-valueType​

Path: cim.ControlArea.EnergyArea / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.LoadArea, cim.SubLoadArea]

coreeqc.DCConverterUnit.Substation-valueType​

Path: cim.DCConverterUnit.Substation / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: cim:Substation"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.Substation]

coreeqc.DCConverterUnit.operationMode-datatype​

Path: cim.DCConverterUnit.operationMode
This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier) or it is enumerated value not part of the profile."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.DCConverterOperatingModeKind.bipolar, cim.DCConverterOperatingModeKind.monopolarGroundReturn, cim.DCConverterOperatingModeKind.monopolarMetallicReturn]

coreeqc.DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueTypeNodeShape​

  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment-valueType​

Path: cim.DCTerminal.DCConductingEquipment / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.DCSeriesDevice, cim.DCGround, cim.DCSwitch, cim.DCShunt, cim.DCBusbar, cim.DCLineSegment, cim.DCChopper, cim.DCDisconnector, cim.DCBreaker, cim.Equipment]

This constraint validates the cardinality of the property (attribute).

  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.Equipment.EquipmentContainer-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.Equipment.EquipmentContainer-valueType​

Path: cim.Equipment.EquipmentContainer / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.VoltageLevel, cim.Line, cim.Substation, cim.Bay, cim.DCConverterUnit, cim.DCLine]

coreeqc.GrossToNetActivePowerCurve.GeneratingUnit-valueType​

Path: cim.GrossToNetActivePowerCurve.GeneratingUnit / rdf.type

This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not literal or it violates the xsd datatype."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.DatatypeConstraintComponentDatatype: xsd.boolean
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.Literal

coreeqc.Equipment.normallyInService-cardinality​

Path: cim.Equipment.normallyInService
This constraint validates the cardinality of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "Cardinality violation. Upper bound shall be 1"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

coreeqc.Line.Region-cardinality​

Path: cim.Line.Region
This constraint validates the cardinality of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "Cardinality violation. Upper bound shall be 1"

Constraints:

coreeqc.Line.Region-valueType​

Path: cim.Line.Region / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: cim:SubGeographicalRegion"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.SubGeographicalRegion]

coreeqc.OperationalLimitSet.Equipment-valueTypeNodeShape​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.OperationalLimitSet
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.OperationalLimitSet.Equipment-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.OperationalLimitSet.Equipment-valueType​

Path: cim.OperationalLimitSet.Equipment / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.HydroPump, cim.GeneratingUnit, cim.SurgeArrester, cim.WaveTrap, cim.FaultIndicator, cim.Clamp, cim.SeriesCompensator, cim.Switch, cim.Ground, cim.PowerTransformer, cim.DCSeriesDevice, cim.DCGround, cim.DCSwitch, cim.DCShunt, cim.DCBusbar, cim.DCLineSegment, cim.DCChopper, cim.PowerElectronicsWindUnit, cim.BatteryUnit, cim.PhotoVoltaicUnit, cim.SolarGeneratingUnit, cim.ThermalGeneratingUnit, cim.WindGeneratingUnit, cim.NuclearGeneratingUnit, cim.HydroGeneratingUnit, cim.PotentialTransformer, cim.PostLineSensor, cim.CurrentTransformer, cim.EnergySource, cim.EnergyConsumer, cim.GroundingImpedance, cim.PetersenCoil, cim.Junction, cim.BusbarSection, cim.EquivalentBranch, cim.EquivalentInjection, cim.EquivalentShunt, cim.Disconnector, cim.GroundDisconnector, cim.Fuse, cim.Jumper, cim.Cut, cim.ACLineSegment, cim.CsConverter, cim.VsConverter, cim.DCDisconnector, cim.DCBreaker, cim.StaticVarCompensator, cim.PowerElectronicsConnection, cim.ExternalNetworkInjection, cim.NonConformLoad, cim.StationSupply, cim.ConformLoad, cim.LoadBreakSwitch, cim.Breaker, cim.SynchronousMachine, cim.AsynchronousMachine, cim.LinearShuntCompensator, cim.NonlinearShuntCompensator, cim.DisconnectingCircuitBreaker]

coreeqc.OperationalLimitSet.Terminal-valueTypeNodeShape​

Messages:

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.Terminal, cim.ACDCConverterDCTerminal, cim.DCTerminal]

This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not literal or it violates the xsd datatype."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.DatatypeConstraintComponentDatatype: xsd.float
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.Literal

This constraint validates the cardinality of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "Cardinality violation. Upper bound shall be 1"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

io.IdentifiedObject.shortName-datatype​

Path: cim100.IdentifiedObject.shortName
This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not literal or it violates the xsd datatype."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.DatatypeConstraintComponentDatatype: xsd.string
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.Literal

coreeqc.PowerElectronicsConnection.PowerElectronicsUnit-valueTypeNodeShape​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.PowerElectronicsConnection
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.PowerElectronicsConnection.PowerElectronicsUnit-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.PowerElectronicsConnection.PowerElectronicsUnit-valueType​

Path: cim.PowerElectronicsConnection.PowerElectronicsUnit / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.PowerElectronicsWindUnit, cim.BatteryUnit, cim.PhotoVoltaicUnit]

Path: cim.PowerTransformerEnd.PowerTransformer / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

coreeqc.PowerTransformerEnd.connectionKind-datatype​

This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier) or it is enumerated value not part of the profile."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.WindingConnection.Zn, cim.WindingConnection.Y, cim.WindingConnection.Z, cim.WindingConnection.A, cim.WindingConnection.D, cim.WindingConnection.I, cim.WindingConnection.Yn]

coreeqc.RegularTimePoint.IntervalSchedule-valueTypeNodeShape​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.RegularTimePoint
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.RegularTimePoint.IntervalSchedule-valueTypeNodeShape

Nested Properties:

coreeqc.RegularTimePoint.IntervalSchedule-valueType​

Path: cim.RegularTimePoint.IntervalSchedule / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following occurs: 1) The value type is not IRI; 2) The value type is not the right class."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.ConformLoadSchedule, cim.SwitchSchedule, cim.TapSchedule, cim.NonConformLoadSchedule, cim.RegulationSchedule]

This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: cim:OperationalLimitSet"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.OperationalLimitSet]

coreeqc.OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitType-cardinality​

Path: cim.OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitType
This constraint validates the cardinality of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "Missing required association."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinCountConstraintComponentMinCount: 1
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

coreeqc.OperationalLimit.OperationalLimitType-valueType​

This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: cim:OperationalLimitType"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.OperationalLimitType]

This constraint validates the cardinality of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "Cardinality violation. Upper bound shall be 1"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxCountConstraintComponentMaxCount: 1

io.IdentifiedObject.description-datatype​

This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

ComponentDetails

coreeqc.WindGeneratingUnit.windGenUnitType-datatype​

Path: cim.WindGeneratingUnit.windGenUnitType
This constraint validates the datatype of the property (attribute).

Messages:

  • "The datatype is not IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier) or it is enumerated value not part of the profile."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.WindGenUnitKind.offshore, cim.WindGenUnitKind.onshore]

Path: cim100.WindGeneratingUnit.WindPowerPlant

coreeqc.WindGeneratingUnit.WindPowerPlant-valueType​

Path: cim100.WindGeneratingUnit.WindPowerPlant / rdf.type
This constraint validates the value type of the association at the used direction.

Messages:

  • "One of the following does not conform: 1) The value type shall be IRI; 2) The value type shall be an instance of the class: eu:WindPowerPlant"

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.NodeKindConstraintComponentNodeKind: sh.IRI
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim100.WindPowerPlant]

coreeqc.WindPowerPlant​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim100.WindPowerPlant
  • implicitClassTarget: coreeqc.WindPowerPlant
